data.description: BLDC motors are part of the actuator chain whose losses are modelled.
The main-board power sensor provides the onboard power measurements used as the regression target.
Brushless DC Motor cites Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm.
The Reality Gap in Robotics: Challenges, Solutions, and Best Practices cites or references Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm.
Dex3-1 hands were mounted on the left arm during the experiments.

The Battery Management System is part of the onboard power measurement chain.
Harmonic-drive reducers are used in the arm joints and exhibit asymmetric acceleration/braking behaviour.

The paper identifies and validates the power consumption model using the physical Unitree G1 robot.
